title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/cgroups to v0.0.4 - autoclosed
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/cgroups](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups) | `v0.0.3` -> `v0.0.4` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.4?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.3/v0.0.4?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/cgroups (github.com/opencontainers/cgroups)</summary>

### [`v0.0.4`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/releases/tag/v0.0.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.3...v0.0.4)

#### What's Changed

- fs2: Fix statHugeTlb error when rsvd usage is present by [@​gavinkflam](https://redirect.github.com/gavinkflam) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/24](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/24)
- ci: bump golangci-lint, golangci-lint-action by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/23](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/23)
- fs2: ignore no device error when reading freezer state by [@​lifubang](https://redirect.github.com/lifubang) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/25](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/25)

#### New Contributors

- [@​gavinkflam](https://redirect.github.com/gavinkflam) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/24](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/24)
- [@​lifubang](https://redirect.github.com/lifubang) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/25](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/25)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.3...v0.0.4

</details>
